parameters.name: list_leads
parameters.description: List recent Zoho Leads. Returns all fields (incl. custom fields).

parameters.name: search_leads
parameters.description: Search Zoho Leads. Use either word (full-text) OR field+operator+value (criteria).

value.field: ={{ $fromAI('field', "Field api_name for criteria search (Email, Phone, Last_Name, Company, ...)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Full-text search term across all fields (recommended)
Field api_name for criteria search (Email, Phone, Last_Name, Company, ...)
Value to match in criteria search

parameters.name: get_lead
parameters.description: Get single Zoho Lead by Id. Returns all fields.

parameters.name: create_lead
parameters.description: Create a Zoho Lead. Required: Last_Name, Company.

schema.description: Lead source (e.g. Cold Call, Web, Referral)
Lead status (e.g. Not Contacted, Contacted, Qualified)
JSON string for custom fields, e.g. '{"VIP_Status":true}'

parameters.name: update_lead
parameters.description: Update a Zoho Lead by Id. Any subset of fields.

parameters.name: delete_lead
parameters.description: Delete a Zoho Lead by Id (Soft-Delete, 60d Recycle Bin).

parameters.name: convert_lead
parameters.description: Convert a Zoho Lead into Contact + Account (+ optional Deal). Zoho's classic Lead-Qualification flow.

value.Deal_Name: ={{ $fromAI('Deal_Name', "Optional — create a Deal during conversion; Deal_Name required if any Deal-* field is set", 'string') }}
value.Stage: ={{ $fromAI('Stage', "Deal Stage (e.g. Qualification, Closed Won) — required if creating a Deal", 'string') }}
value.Closing_Date: ={{ $fromAI('Closing_Date', "Deal Closing_Date YYYY-MM-DD — required if creating a Deal", 'string') }}
value.assign_to: ={{ $fromAI('assign_to', "User ID to assign new Contact/Account/Deal to — optional", 'string') }}

schema.description: REQUIRED — Zoho Lead ID to convert
Optional — create a Deal during conversion; Deal_Name required if any Deal-* field is set
Deal Stage (e.g. Qualification, Closed Won) — required if creating a Deal
Deal Closing_Date YYYY-MM-DD — required if creating a Deal
User ID to assign new Contact/Account/Deal to — optional

parameters.name: list_contacts
parameters.description: List recent Zoho Contacts. Returns all fields.

parameters.name: search_contacts
parameters.description: Search Zoho Contacts. word OR field+operator+value.

parameters.name: get_contact
parameters.description: Get single Zoho Contact by Id.

parameters.name: create_contact
parameters.description: Create a Zoho Contact. Required: Last_Name.

parameters.name: update_contact
parameters.description: Update a Zoho Contact by Id.

parameters.name: delete_contact
parameters.description: Delete a Zoho Contact by Id (Soft-Delete, 60d).

parameters.name: list_accounts
parameters.description: List recent Zoho Accounts (companies). Returns all fields.

parameters.name: search_accounts
parameters.description: Search Zoho Accounts.

parameters.name: get_account
parameters.description: Get single Zoho Account by Id.

parameters.name: create_account
parameters.description: Create a Zoho Account. Required: Account_Name.

parameters.name: update_account
parameters.description: Update a Zoho Account by Id. No delete — remove via Zoho UI for safety.

parameters.name: list_deals
parameters.description: List recent Zoho Deals. Returns all fields.

parameters.name: search_deals
parameters.description: Search Zoho Deals.

value.field: ={{ $fromAI('field', "Field name (Deal_Name, Stage, Amount, Closing_Date, Account_Name, Owner, ...)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Field name (Deal_Name, Stage, Amount, Closing_Date, Account_Name, Owner, ...)

parameters.name: get_deal
parameters.description: Get single Zoho Deal by Id.

parameters.name: create_deal
parameters.description: Create a Zoho Deal. Required: Deal_Name, Stage, Closing_Date.

value.Stage: ={{ $fromAI('Stage', "REQUIRED — Deal stage (e.g. Qualification, Negotiation/Review, Closed Won)", 'string') }}

schema.description: REQUIRED — Deal stage (e.g. Qualification, Negotiation/Review, Closed Won)

parameters.name: update_deal
parameters.description: Update a Zoho Deal by Id. No delete — remove via Zoho UI for safety.

parameters.name: list_tasks
parameters.description: List recent Zoho Tasks.

parameters.name: get_task
parameters.description: Get single Zoho Task by Id.

parameters.name: create_task
parameters.description: Create a Zoho Task. Required: Subject.

parameters.name: update_task
parameters.description: Update a Zoho Task by Id — typically to mark it Completed.

parameters.name: delete_task
parameters.description: Delete a Zoho Task by Id (Soft-Delete, 60d Recycle Bin).

parameters.name: list_cases
parameters.description: List recent Zoho Cases (Service module).

parameters.name: get_case
parameters.description: Get single Zoho Case by Id.

parameters.name: create_case
parameters.description: Create a Zoho Case. Required: Subject, Status.

parameters.name: update_case
parameters.description: Update a Zoho Case by Id — typically to update Status or Description.

parameters.name: list_notes
parameters.description: List Notes attached to a record (any module). Notes are Zoho's record-level comments/activity log.

value.parent_id: ={{ $fromAI('parent_id', "REQUIRED — Record ID to list notes for", 'string') }}

schema.description: REQUIRED — Module of the parent record (Leads|Contacts|Accounts|Deals|Tasks|Cases)
REQUIRED — Record ID to list notes for

parameters.name: create_note
parameters.description: Attach a Note to any Zoho record. Common use: log an interaction, meeting outcome, or status update.

schema.description: Note body text (optional if Note_Title provided)

parameters.name: list_users
parameters.description: List Zoho CRM users (for Owner_ID picker / assignment). Default: ActiveUsers only.

value.type: ={{ $fromAI('type', "Filter type: ActiveUsers | DeactiveUsers | ConfirmedUsers | NotConfirmedUsers | DeletedUsers | ActiveConfirmedUsers | AdminUsers | ActiveConfirmedAdmins | CurrentUser. Default: ActiveUsers", 'string') }}

schema.description: Filter type: ActiveUsers | DeactiveUsers | ConfirmedUsers | NotConfirmedUsers | DeletedUsers | ActiveConfirmedUsers | AdminUsers | ActiveConfirmedAdmins | CurrentUser. Default: ActiveUsers

parameters.name: coql_query
parameters.description: Run raw COQL query (SQL-like). Requires WHERE clause.

value.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', "Full COQL string, e.g. SELECT Last_Name, Email FROM Leads WHERE Last_Name is not null LIMIT 10. Uses Zoho api_names (Last_Name not lastname).", 'string') }}

schema.description: Full COQL string, e.g. SELECT Last_Name, Email FROM Leads WHERE Last_Name is not null LIMIT 10. Uses Zoho api_names (Last_Name not lastname).

parameters.name: describe_module
parameters.description: Get metadata for a Zoho module — list all fields incl. custom fields, types, picklist values. Use this first to discover custom field api_names.

value.module_name: ={{ $fromAI('module_name', "Module name: Leads | Contacts | Accounts | Deals | Tasks | Cases | Products | Quotes | Vendors | Invoices (case-sensitive)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Module name: Leads | Contacts | Accounts | Deals | Tasks | Cases | Products | Quotes | Vendors | Invoices (case-sensitive)
